caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium in front of a textured green stone wall, delivering a speech. He is dressed in a light beige traditional Indian outfit, including a sleeveless vest over a long-sleeved shirt. Two microphones are attached to the podium in front of him. In the initial moments, he stands with his hands clasped together, looking toward his left. He then adjusts his eyeglasses with both hands before transitioning into a gesture where he raises both palms outward, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. To his right, a tall, cylindrical decorative column with gold trim and small red flowers is visible. The background remains static throughout the sequence, while Modi's movements shift from a still, poised stance to active gesturing.
